title: Smarty US Address Response
description: A single validated address candidate returned by the Smarty US Street Address API.

input_id.description: The input_id submitted with the request, echoed back unchanged.

input_index.description: Zero-based position of this address in the batch request.

candidate_index.description: Zero-based index of this candidate among multiple matches for the same input.

addressee.description: Recipient name or company name associated with the address.

delivery_line_1.description: The primary delivery line (e.g., 1600 Amphitheatre Pkwy).

delivery_line_2.description: Secondary delivery line (usually blank, used for military addresses).

last_line.description: City, state, and ZIP Code combined (e.g., Mountain View CA 94043-1351).

Components.title: Address Components
Components.description: The individual parsed components of the standardized address.

primary_number.description: House, PO Box, or building number.

street_predirection.description: Directional preceding the street name (N, S, E, W, etc.).

street_suffix.description: Abbreviated street type (St, Ave, Blvd, etc.).

secondary_designator.description: Apartment or suite designator (Apt, Ste, Unit, etc.).

Metadata.title: Address Metadata
Metadata.description: Geographical and postal metadata about the address.

record_type.description: F=Firm, G=General Delivery, H=High-rise, P=PO Box, R=Rural Route, S=Street.

rdi.description: Residential Delivery Indicator: Residential or Commercial.

precision.description: Geocode precision level (Zip5, Zip6, Zip7, Zip8, Zip9, Block, Parcel, Rooftop).

Analysis.title: Address Analysis
Analysis.description: USPS DPV and other deliverability analysis results.

dpv_match_code.description: Y=confirmed, S=secondary missing, D=secondary added, N=not confirmed.

dpv_footnotes.description: Two-character codes indicating address details and correction notes.
